subcodes.first_line: The True One, glorified be His majesty, hath heard and heareth the call of His friends, and the response hath been revealed from the Dayspring of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله ندای دوستان خود را شنیده و میشنود و جواب از مطلع عنایت نازل شده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for assistance; intercession, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
